summary: The diff implements most requirements well: romantic theme (REQ-1), open public letters access (REQ-2), and inline Read More/Read Less expansion (REQ-3) are all clearly implemented. The hero image is referenced in PublicFeedPage.tsx at the correct path pattern, but the actual image file (frontend/public/assets/generated/romantic-hero.png or the dim_1440x600 variant) was not added as a new file in the diff. The image path used in code is 'romantic-hero.dim_1440x600.png' rather than 'romantic-hero.png' as specified in REQ-4's AC, though the build request image requirement does mention 'romantic-hero.dim_1440x600.png'. No new files were added per the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and render a romantic hero background image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/romantic-hero.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files. The image file itself (frontend/public/assets/generated/romantic-hero.dim_1440x600.png or romantic-hero.png) was never added as a static asset. The code in PublicFeedPage.tsx references it, but without the actual image file being present, the AC requiring the image to be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/ cannot be satisfied.
